class.name: InstancedRenderer3D
class.brief_description: A Node3D that renders ECS entities as individual RenderingServer geometry instances, with LOD support.
class.description: [b]InstancedRenderer3D[/b] is a specialized 3D node that efficiently renders multiple ECS entities as individual RenderingServer geometry instances. It maps one or more Flecs prefabs to rendering instances, updating their transforms each frame. Each InstancedRenderer3D can have multiple LOD (Level of Detail) levels configured, allowing for automatic mesh swapping at different distances for improved performance.

method.name: get_discovered_instance_uniforms
method.description: Returns the list of instance-specific uniform names discovered from the material.

method.name: get_lod_levels
method.description: Returns an array of [InstancedRenderer3DLODConfiguration] resources representing each LOD level.

method.name: get_material
method.description: Returns the material used for rendering all instances.

method.name: get_prefabs_rendered
method.description: Returns the array of prefab names whose entities will be rendered by this renderer.

method.name: set_discovered_instance_uniforms
method.description: Sets the list of instance-specific uniform names from the material.

method.name: set_lod_levels
method.description: Sets the LOD level configurations. Each element should be an [InstancedRenderer3DLODConfiguration] resource. Maximum [constant MAX_LOD_LEVELS] levels are supported.

method.name: set_material
method.description: Sets the material used for rendering all instances.

method.name: set_prefabs_rendered
method.description: Sets the array of prefab names whose entities will be rendered by this renderer.

method.name: validate_configuration
method.description: Validates the renderer configuration and emits warnings for any issues. Returns true if the configuration is valid enough to render.

members.member: Read-only list of instance uniform component names discovered from the configured prefabs and material.
LOD level resources used to render instances at different visibility ranges.
The material used for all rendered instances.
Prefab names whose entities are rendered by this node.

constants.constant: Maximum number of LOD levels supported by an InstancedRenderer3D.
